item.title: Seed Gap - Music Composition Knowledge Bases
item.description: Seed Gap: Music Composition Knowledge Bases Identifying what the Seed is missing for building a knowledge base about music composition.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Knowledge Calibration and Trust Assessment
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Knowledge Calibration and Trust Assessment How do we know whether to trust our own knowledge base enough to act on it? The Problem The Seed provides extensive guidance on: Confidence markers (high, emerging, disputed, obsolete) Source quality hierarchy (systematic reviews >...

item.title: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed Drop this file into any vault to bootstrap a healthy, self-improving knowledge base.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - AI Model Version Dependencies in Knowledge Bases
item.description: Frontier Exploration - AI Model Version Dependencies in Knowledge Bases How to handle knowledge that depends on specific AI models or versions — and what happens when models change.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - AI-Generated Content Verification
item.description: Frontier Exploration - AI-Generated Content Verification The Gap The Seed covers: Source citation requirements Confidence markers Procedural knowledge verification AI-optimized knowledge structures But there’s no explicit guidance on: How to verify that content generated by AI assistants is accurate...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - AI-Optimized Knowledge Bases
item.description: Frontier Exploration - AI-Optimized Knowledge Bases How should knowledge bases be structured when the primary consumer is an AI agent rather than a human? The Problem Space The current Seed assumes human readers who can: Follow natural language explanations Ask clarifying questions when confused Inf...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - API and External Service Dependencies
item.description: Frontier Exploration - API and External Service Dependencies The Gap The Seed covers: Software version dependencies — which software version knowledge applies to (version:, eol-estimate) Physical equipment dependencies — what tools are required to execute knowledge But it does NOT cover: External se...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Access-Controlled Knowledge
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Access-Controlled Knowledge How do we handle knowledge that requires payment, subscription, or authentication to access? The Problem An increasing amount of valuable knowledge exists behind access controls: Paid courses (Udemy, MasterClass, Skillshare) Members-only content (Su...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Adaptation and Transcoding Knowledge
item.description: Note: The rules proposed in this note have been incorporated into the Seed (see Seed sections 6-7 under “Adaptation Knowledge”).

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Building Knowledge Bases in Unfamiliar Domains
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Building Knowledge Bases in Unfamiliar Domains What to do when the AI doesn’t understand the topic it’s helping to document The Problem The Seed assumes an AI agent can: Understand the domain it’s working in Identify what constitutes quality knowledge Recognize when knowledge i...
